title: Dictionaries querying distributed table(s) fails if allow_experimental_analyzer=1 is set explicitly in user profile configuration
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
Dictionaries does not work as expected when `<allow_experimental_analyzer>1</allow_experimental_analyzer>` is set in the profile configuration. It seems like if this settings is set explicitly, dictionaries will use the old analyzer (treating `allow_experimental_analyzer` as zero) when executing selects against distributed-tables?
Noticed this while performing tests for upgrading ClickHouse from 24.8.5 to 25.8 (the bug was introduced in 25.2, this is not an issue in 25.1).
I am aware of that `allow_experimental_analyzer` defaults to True in the affected releases. So the fix for us was simply to drop the configuration setting.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
To reproduce (with `<allow_experimental_analyzer>1</allow_experimental_analyzer>` in  `users.xml`):
```
CREATE DATABASE test ON CLUSTER 'test_cluster';
CREATE TABLE test.test ON CLUSTER 'test_cluster'
(
name    String,
revenue Int
)
ENGINE ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{shard}/test/test', '{replica}')
ORDER BY name;
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE test.test_d ON CLUSTER 'test_cluster' AS test.test ENGINE = Distributed('test_cluster', 'test', test, rand());
INSERT INTO test.test_d (name, revenue) VALUES ('a', 10), ('a', 100), ('a', 20), ('b', 100), ('b', 313), ('b', 200);
CREATE DICTIONARY test.test_dictionary ON CLUSTER  'test_cluster'
(
name    String,
revenue INT,
is_even boolean
)
PRIMARY KEY name
LAYOUT(COMPLEX_KEY_HASHED())
SOURCE (
CLICKHOUSE(
DB 'test'
QUERY 'select name, revenue, case when revenue % 10 = 0 then 1 else 0 END AS is_even
FROM test.test_d
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY name ORDER BY revenue DESC) = 1'
)
)
LIFETIME(MIN 0 MAX 0);
-- Verify that changed and value are both 1
SELECT value, changed FROM clusterAllReplicas('test_cluster', system.settings) WHERE name like 'allow_experimental_analyzer';
SYSTEM RELOAD DICTIONARY ON CLUSTER  'test_cluster' test.test_dictionary;
[22000] Code: 48. DB::Exception: There was an error on [clickhouse-03:9000]: Received from <\02<\0 v\0�^QUALIFY clause is not supported in the old analyzer. (NOT_IMPLEMENTED) (version 25.8.1.5101 (official build)):\0#Pld))
SELECT name, revenue from clusterAllReplicas('{cluster}', test.test_dictionary);
```
**NOTE:** If the Dictionary is updated to target the `test.test` table instead of `test.test_d` the error goes away.
**NOTE:** Eventually the RELOAD will be successful if retried multiple times when targeting the `test.test_d` table.
**NOTE:** After removing `<allow_experimental_analyzer>1</allow_experimental_analyzer>` from the configuration the bug is no longer triggered.
**NOTE**: My test cluster has two shards with two replicas each
### Expected behavior
Should be OK to include the `allow_experimental_analyzer setting=1` in the profile configuration. This should not change the behavior since it is the same as the default for this setting.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_db.test_table (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, revenue DOUBLE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) PRIMARY KEY (id);
INSERT INTO test_db.test_table (id, name, revenue) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 1000.50), (2, 'Bob', 2000.75), (3, 'Charlie', NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_db.test_dictionary AS SELECT id, name, revenue > 1500 AS is_high_revenue FROM test_db.test_table WHERE revenue IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, name FROM test_db.test_dictionary WHERE is_high_revenue = TRUE;
key_bug_features: Dictionaries fail with allow_experimental_analyzer set to 1
